title_zh: 换脸前后同框 · 大叔变超级美女
title_en: Before & after in one frame · from an ordinary man to a stunning beauty
desc_zh: 同一路摄像头画面：右上角是换脸前的普通男人，大画面是换脸后的绝色美女，动作口型分毫不差。这就是实时换脸最直观的证明。概念演示。
desc_en: One camera feed: the corner shows the man before the swap, the main view the stunning result — identical motion and lip-sync. Concept demo.
